name: Howtowdie (Scottish Roast Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill the wishbone area of the chicken with stuffing.
2. Fasten the neck skin to the back using a skewer.
3. Fold the wings across the back, tucking the tips underneath.
4. Fill the body cavity lightly (do not overstuff). The stuffing will expand during cooking.
5. Place the chicken, breast side up, in a shallow roasting pan.
6. Arrange halved onions around the chicken.
7. Brush the chicken and onions with margarine.
8. Roast uncovered at 375°F in the oven, brushing the chicken and onions several times with remaining margarine until fully cooked (about 1 1/2 hours).
9. In a large skillet over medium heat, cook and stir halved onions in melted margarine until lightly browned.
10. Stir in oat stuffing and remaining ingredients.
11. Cook and stir until oats are golden brown and crisp (about 3 to 4 minutes).
